query:
INSERT INTO squads (id, project_id, name, leader_agent_id)
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
            RETURNING
                id                  AS "id!: Uuid",
                project_id          AS "project_id!: Uuid",
                name                AS "name!",
                leader_agent_id,
                created_at          AS "created_at!: DateTime<Utc>",
                updated_at          AS "updated_at!: DateTime<Utc>"
